PROP-01b-partial2-inv-010.text: If receiver is address(0), leftover assetOut tokens must remain in contract after bid.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-010.assertion: post bid(): s_receiver == address(0) => no safeTransfer of assetOut AND tokens remain in contract

locations.note: receiver == address(0) branch skips safeTransfer; tokens remain in contract at lines 86-91
